//exclude-note: src/handlers/** are Ponder INDEXING functions: their event args and db-row types come from `ponder codegen` (needs the DB/RPC, so it can't run in an offline typecheck). They are typechecked by `npm run typecheck:ponder` (ponder codegen + tsc) in CI. Plain `npm run typecheck` (this config) covers everything else — pipeline, api, keepers, ops, abis, config, schema.
